summary: Backend-only testing for BUG 2 fixes: goal mapping, profile reset endpoint, and change-log endpoint. All 5 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: NOTE: /api/profile/intake response nests planName under 'plan.planName', not at top level. Frontend must access response.plan.planName
context_for_next_testing_agent: BUG 2 backend fixes verified. Goal mapping works correctly: Strongman→'The Program — Strongman', Hypertrophy→'The Program — Hypertrophy', General Fitness→'The Program — General Strength'. POST /api/profile/reset returns {success: true}. GET /api/coach/change-log returns {changes:[]} without error. Backend logs confirm [PLANGEN] and [INTAKE] print statements working.
